mode_of_action_summary: Fipronil acts by blocking GABA-gated chloride channels in the insect nervous system, causing hyperexcitation, paralysis, and death. It is highly effective against soil and sucking pests with long residual activity.

active_ingredients.name: Fipronil
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: GABA-gated chloride channel blocker causing nervous system disruption

pest_behavior.root_damage: Soil pests attack roots reducing plant stability and nutrient uptake
pest_behavior.boring: Borers enter stems causing dead hearts and reduced yield
pest_behavior.leaf_feeding: Leaf feeders damage foliage reducing photosynthesis
pest_behavior.sap_sucking: Thrips suck sap causing leaf curling and silvering

search_keywords: چوہا کیڑا ختم کرنے کی دوا

application_details.method: Apply as foliar spray or soil drench depending on pest type
application_details.coverage: Ensure uniform coverage of plant and soil zone

resistance_management.advice: Rotate with insecticides of different modes of action

safety: Do not spray during strong wind
benefits: Effective against soil and foliar pests
farmer_benefits: کیڑے لمبے عرصے تک ختم رہندے نیں

multilingual_description.english: Fipronil based insecticide effective against soil and foliar pests.
multilingual_description.urdu: فپرونل پر مشتمل دوا جو زمین اور پتے کے کیڑوں کو ختم کرتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: فپرونل والی دوا جو مٹی تے پتے والے کیڑیاں نوں ختم کردی اے۔

embedding_text: FlipGold 5 SC insecticide contains fipronil and is used for control of stem borer termites white grub and other pests in rice and crops. It works by disrupting insect nervous system and provides long lasting control.
